'''Padda''' was a [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] who resided at [[Zirtran's Anchor/Legends|''Zirtran's Anchor'']] and was a co-owner of ''[[Chabak's]]'' with his cousin [[Quink]]. Padda and Quink were relatives of [[Chabak]]'s original owner, who took over when he disappeared mysteriously.<ref name="ZA" />

Padda was the younger of the Chabak cousins and somewhat of a braggart, who liked to impress people with his stories of romantic conquest and and [[Gambling/Legends|gambling]] victories. In reality he was the spoiled son of wealthy and influential Twi'leks on [[Ryloth/Legends|Ryloth]] and had very little experience away from his [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]]. Lacking any sense of reality, he remained oblivious of how many times he had been close to getting killed by customers who were tired of listening to him.<ref name="ZA" />
